name: DatePicker
description: Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

api.name: DatePicker
api.description: Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

parameters.name: DateTimeValue
parameters.description: Optional DateTime? binding. When set, takes precedence over Value. Changes fire both ValueChanged (DateOnly?) and DateTimeValueChanged (DateTime? at midnight).

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Date format string. When null (default), the display falls back to the current culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for parsing and formatting within this picker. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization.

mdSummary:
# DatePicker

Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/date-picker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DatePicker | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Value | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | DateTimeValue | `DateTime?` | `` | Optional DateTime? binding. When set, takes precedence over Value. Changes fire both ValueChanged (DateOnly?) and DateTimeValueChanged (DateTime? at midnight). |
| DatePicker | DateTimeValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateTime?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Format | `string?` | `` | Date format string. When null (default), the display falls back to the current culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically. |
| DatePicker | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Overrides CurrentCulture for parsing and formatting within this picker. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization. |
| DatePicker | MinDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | MaxDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Presets | `List<DatePickerPreset>?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Mode | `string` | `"Single"` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeStart | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeStartChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeEnd | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeEndChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | ShowTimePicker | `bool` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Time | `TimeSpan?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | TimeChanged | `EventCallback<TimeSpan?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Clearable | `bool` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | TriggerContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | NumberOfMonths | `int` | `1` |  |
| DatePicker | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | StartDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | StartDateChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | EndDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | EndDateChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | MinDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | MaxDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Format | `string` | `"MMM dd, yyyy"` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Presets | `List<DateRangePreset>?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Clearable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `TriggerContent` (DatePicker) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`)
- `DateTimeValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateTime?>`)
- `RangeStartChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`)
- `RangeEndChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`)
- `TimeChanged` (`EventCallback<TimeSpan?>`)

## Sub-components
- `DateRangePicker`

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DatePicker />
```
